coat_colors: any color except brindle or tan markings

description.overview: The Italian Greyhound is a miniature sighthound that combines elegance with a playful, affectionate personality.
description.temperament: IGs are affectionate and playful but sensitive. They bond closely with owners and can be mischievous.
description.health: Prone to dental issues, leg fractures, and eye problems. Fragile bones.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Short bursts of speed but also love lounging.

verdict.summary: Elegant miniature sighthounds with big personalities. IGs are affectionate but fragile. Perfect for gentle owners in apartments.
